sentences.arabic: الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ مَشْرُوبٌ أَصِيلٌ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa je originalno piće u arapskoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee is an authentic drink in Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: تُصْنَعُ مِنَ الْبُنِّ مَعَ الْهَيْلِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ أَحْيَانًا.
sentences.translation: Pravi se od kafe s kardamomom, a ponekad i šafranom.
sentences.translationEn: It is made from coffee with cardamom and sometimes saffron.

sentences.arabic: تُقَدَّمُ فِي فِنَاجِينَ صَغِيرَةٍ بِلَا سُكَّرٍ.
sentences.translation: Servira se u malim šoljicama bez šećera.
sentences.translationEn: It is served in small cups without sugar.

sentences.arabic: يَرْفُضُ الضَّيْفُ الْقَهْوَةَ بِهَزِّ الْفِنْجَانِ يَمِينًا وَيَسَارًا.
sentences.translation: Gost odbija kafu mahanjem šoljice lijevo-desno.
sentences.translationEn: A guest declines coffee by shaking the cup left and right.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَقْدِيمَ الْقَهْوَةِ عِنْدَ الاسْتِقْبَالِ وَاجِبٌ اجْتِمَاعِيٌّ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْخَلِيجِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Nuđenje kafe pri dočeku je društvena obaveza u kulturi Zaliva.
sentences.translationEn: Serving coffee upon welcoming guests is a social obligation in Gulf culture.
